title: A TOOL THAT LOOPS
starterCode: // A function can hold a loop inside it. row() rolls a whole row.
hints: A function can hold a loop inside it. row() could roll a whole row by itself.
Put a repeat inside your function: function row() { repeat 4 { … } }.
Then it's just row(), a turn, row() — an L in three short lines.
briefing: Put a loop INSIDE a function. row() rolls four squares by itself. Call row(), turn the corner, call row() again — the loop hides inside your command.
